name: sotn-cmd
description: Runs an allowlisted set of SOTN build, diff, permuter, git and queue actions in WSL.
long_description:
Gives Claude a hard-allowlisted set of repo actions. There is NO general shell.

Every argument is validated (version enum, strict regexes for symbols and overlays, in-repo path checks), commands run as an argv list rather than through a shell, and output is truncated. Scoped filesystem actions let Claude read and edit the repo when the folder is not connected directly.

Ships with dry-run ENABLED: every tool returns the exact command it would run without executing it. Turn dry-run off only after reviewing what it produces.

tools.name: list_allowed
tools.description: Show the exact allowlist and dry-run state

tools.name: make_force_symbols
tools.description: Extract symbols from a good build

tools.name: permuter
tools.description: Run decomp-permuter on an in-repo work dir

tools.name: queue_list
tools.description: List queue records, optionally by status

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Write an in-repo text file (respects dry-run)

repo_path.title: Repository path (as WSL sees it)
repo_path.description: Absolute WSL path to the sotn-decomp repo. A Windows folder C:\Users\you\Documents\SOTN-Decomp is /mnt/c/Users/you/Documents/SOTN-Decomp in WSL.

wsl_distro.title: WSL distribution
wsl_distro.description: Which WSL distro to run in. Must be the one with the build toolchain, not docker-desktop.

dry_run.title: Dry run (1 = preview only, 0 = actually execute)
dry_run.description: Leave at 1 until you have reviewed the commands it produces. At 1 every tool returns the argv it would run and changes nothing.
